mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT sr.course_id FROM edu_study_record sr INNER JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(1) AS total_count FROM edu_chapter WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 GROUP BY course_id ) ch ON ch.course_id = sr.course_id WHERE sr.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY sr.course_id, ch.total_count HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sr.chapter_id) >= ch.total_count ) t
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(score)), 0) FROM edu_exam_record WHERE user_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 AND status != 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT d.study_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.study_date DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT DATE(update_time) AS study_date FROM edu_study_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND DATE(update_time) <= CURDATE() ) d ) x WHERE x.study_date = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL x.rn - 1 DAY)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kp.id) FROM edu_practice_record pr INNER JOIN edu_question_knowledge_point qkp ON qkp.question_id = pr.question_id INNER JOIN edu_knowledge_point kp ON kp.id = qkp.knowledge_point_id WHERE pr.user_id = #{studentId} AND pr.deleted = 0 AND pr.is_correct = 1 AND kp.deleted = 0 AND kp.status = 1 AND DATE(pr.create_time) = #{date}

SELECT sr.id AS id, c.name AS courseName, FLOOR(sr.total_study_second / 60) AS durationMinutes, DATE_FORMAT(sr.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS studyTime FROM edu_study_record sr LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON c.id = sr.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE sr.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sr.update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT w.week_start_date AS weekStartDate, COALESCE(s.study_seconds, 0) AS studySeconds, COALESCE(s.study_days, 0) AS studyDays, COALESCE(p.practice_count, 0) AS practiceCount, COALESCE(p.practice_correct_count, 0) AS practiceCorrectCount, COALESCE(e.exam_count, 0) AS examCount, COALESCE(e.exam_avg_score, 0) AS examAvgScore, COALESCE(k.knowledge_count, 0) AS knowledgeCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) - INTERVAL n.n WEEK AS week_start_date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 ) n WHERE n.n < #{weekCount} ) w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE(update_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(update_time) DAY) AS week_start_date, SUM(total_study_second) AS study_seconds, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(update_time)) AS study_days FROM edu_study_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND DATE(update_time) >= #{fromDate} GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(update_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(update_time) DAY) ) s ON s.week_start_date = w.week_start_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE(create_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(create_time) DAY) AS week_start_date, COUNT(1) AS practice_count, SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS practice_correct_count FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) >= #{fromDate} GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(create_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(create_time) DAY) ) p ON p.week_start_date = w.week_start_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE(submit_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(submit_time) DAY) AS week_start_date, COUNT(1) AS exam_count, ROUND(AVG(score)) AS exam_avg_score FROM edu_exam_record WHERE user_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 AND status != 0 AND DATE(submit_time) >= #{fromDate} GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(submit_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(submit_time) DAY) ) e ON e.week_start_date = w.week_start_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE(pr.create_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(pr.create_time) DAY) AS week_start_date, COUNT(DISTINCT qkp.knowledge_point_id) AS knowledge_count FROM edu_practice_record pr INNER JOIN edu_question_knowledge_point qkp ON qkp.question_id = pr.question_id WHERE pr.user_id = #{studentId} AND pr.deleted = 0 AND pr.is_correct = 1 AND DATE(pr.create_time) >= #{fromDate} GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(pr.create_time), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(pr.create_time) DAY) ) k ON k.week_start_date = w.week_start_date ORDER BY w.week_start_date DESC

SELECT d.study_date AS studyDate, COALESCE(s.study_seconds, 0) AS studySeconds, COALESCE(p.practice_count, 0) AS practiceCount, COALESCE(k.knowledge_count, 0) AS knowledgeCount FROM ( SELECT #{startDate} + INTERVAL n.n DAY AS study_date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 ) n WHERE #{startDate} + INTERVAL n.n DAY <= #{endDate} ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(update_time) AS study_date, SUM(total_study_second) AS study_seconds FROM edu_study_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND DATE(update_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(update_time) ) s ON s.study_date = d.study_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS study_date, COUNT(1) AS practice_count FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ) p ON p.study_date = d.study_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(pr.create_time) AS study_date, COUNT(DISTINCT qkp.knowledge_point_id) AS knowledge_count FROM edu_practice_record pr INNER JOIN edu_question_knowledge_point qkp ON qkp.question_id = pr.question_id WHERE pr.user_id = #{studentId} AND pr.deleted = 0 AND pr.is_correct = 1 AND DATE(pr.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(pr.create_time) ) k ON k.study_date = d.study_date ORDER BY d.study_date ASC

SELECT kp.id AS id, kp.title AS name, kp.course_id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, COUNT(pr.id) AS practiceCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correctCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(pr.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(pr.id)) END AS mastery FROM edu_knowledge_point kp LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON c.id = kp.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN edu_question_knowledge_point qkp ON qkp.knowledge_point_id = kp.id LEFT JOIN edu_practice_record pr ON pr.question_id = qkp.question_id AND pr.user_id = #{studentId} AND pr.deleted = 0 WHERE kp.deleted = 0 AND kp.status = 1 GROUP BY kp.id, kp.title, kp.course_id, c.name ORDER BY mastery ASC, practiceCount DESC, kp.id DESC

SELECT c.id AS id, c.name AS title, weak.name AS knowledge, COUNT(ch.id) AS lessonCount, 0 AS difficulty FROM ( SELECT kp.course_id, kp.title AS name, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.is_correct = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(pr.id)) AS mastery FROM edu_practice_record pr INNER JOIN edu_question_knowledge_point qkp ON qkp.question_id = pr.question_id INNER JOIN edu_knowledge_point kp ON kp.id = qkp.knowledge_point_id WHERE pr.user_id = #{studentId} AND pr.deleted = 0 AND kp.deleted = 0 AND kp.status = 1 GROUP BY kp.id, kp.course_id, kp.title HAVING mastery < 80 ORDER BY mastery ASC LIMIT #{limit} ) weak INNER JOIN edu_course c ON c.id = weak.course_id AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 LEFT JOIN edu_chapter ch ON ch.course_id = c.id AND ch.deleted = 0 AND ch.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.name, weak.name ORDER BY c.recommended DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT id, student_id, week_start_date, week_end_date, status, weak_points, advantage_summary, weak_summary, study_suggestion, duration_target, question_target, knowledge_target, create_time, update_time FROM edu_growth_week_plan WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND week_start_date = #{weekStartDate} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_growth_week_plan ( student_id, week_start_date, week_end_date, status, weak_points, advantage_summary, weak_summary, study_suggestion, duration_target, question_target, knowledge_target, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{weekStartDate}, #{weekEndDate}, #{status}, #{weakPoints}, #{advantageSummary}, #{weakSummary}, #{studySuggestion}, #{durationTarget}, #{questionTarget}, #{knowledgeTarget}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_id, student_id, plan_date, task_type, jump_type, title, knowledge_point_id, knowledge_name, target_id, duration_target, question_target, completed, complete_time, create_time, update_time FROM edu_growth_plan_task WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY plan_date ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO edu_growth_plan_task ( plan_id, student_id, plan_date, task_type, jump_type, title, knowledge_point_id, knowledge_name, target_id, duration_target, question_target, completed, complete_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.planId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.planDate}, #{item.taskType}, #{item.jumpType}, #{item.title}, #{item.knowledgePointId}, #{item.knowledgeName}, #{item.targetId}, #{item.durationTarget}, #{item.questionTarget}, #{item.completed}, #{item.completeTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
